positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical vector illustration of interconnected celestial constellations and stylized crescent moons, forming an elegant, repeating pattern. The primary subject features delicate, flowing linework contrasted against solid blocks of deep indigo and luminous gold foil effect. Composition is perfectly centered and radiates symmetry, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Style: Geometric ornamental art mixed with celestial mysticism. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow from the center point. Clean lines, high contrast, solid silhouettes.
negative: blurry, dirty, noise, artifact, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grunge, cartoon, photo, gradient, realism
